name: Starter Scene Art Direction
artBrief: A readable starter 2D adventure background with clear walkable space and room for future hotspots.

context.artBrief: A readable starter 2D adventure background with clear walkable space and room for future hotspots.

outputs.sceneBackgroundPrompt: Wide layered 2D adventure background for Cave at 1280x720. Keep the lower scene readable as a walkable area, use clear foreground/midground/background depth, and leave obvious open spaces for future hotspots.
animationNotes: Keep the lower half readable for player movement.
Avoid embedding UI text or characters in the background.
outputs.negativePrompt: characters, people, UI, text, logo, watermark, unreadable silhouettes, cluttered walkable area, photorealism

generationTargets.safetyNegativePrompt: transparent background, floating isolated props, UI, text, logo, watermark
